items.body:
Reservation Confirmation

Dates & Details:
Check-in: Apr 04, 2026 at 4:00 PM
Check-out: Apr 07, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Nights: 3
Guests: 2

If anything is incorrect, please let me know ASAP so I can update it before arrival.

Address:
419 Summa St, West Palm Beach, FL 33405
https://www.google.com/maps/place/26.65103,-80.05702

Parking:
Street parking is available on a first-come basis. Driveway parking is limited to registered vehicles.

WIFI:
Network name: SeabreezeStay
Password: ShellsAndSand
House Rules:
No smoking or parties/events
Quiet hours: 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Hi,

Thanks for booking with us! Your door code is 4030. The code activates at 4 PM on check-in day. Please use the smart lock at the main entrance and message us if you have any trouble.
Please send a quick message after you arrive so we can make sure everything is perfect for your stay.
Reminder: check-out is Apr 07, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Please load the dishwasher and start it, place used towels in the tub, and lock the door on your way out.
